Home/Products/Micro Bot
RENDER: Front View

Features designed for humans

Expressive OLED Face

Communicates through eyes and expressions. No creepy cameras, just pure emotion.

Touch Interaction

Pet the head to calm it down or wake it up. Capacitive touch sensors built-in.

Sound Reactive

Dances to your music or listens to you speak. All audio processing happens locally on the chip.

Voice Focus Mode

Tell it 'Focus' to start a Pomodoro timer. Works completely offline without wake words sent to cloud.

Mood LEDs

Ambient lighting that shifts with the bot's mood or your room's vibe.

Rechargeable

USB-C charging with 10+ days of battery life on a single charge.

Privacy Guarantee

What happens in your room,
stays in your room.

Most smart devices are data vacuums. Micro Bot is different. It has no Wi-Fi chip, no cloud connection, and no storage for recordings. It is physically impossible for us to spy on you.

No Wi-Fi

Zero internet connectivity. Updates happen via USB cable only.

No Cloud

All processing happens on the device's local processor.

No Recording

Microphone data is processed in real-time and instantly discarded.

Technical Specifications

ProcessorDual-core 240MHz RISC-V (Made in India)
Display1.3 inch OLED (128x64)
SensorsCapacitive touch, Microphone, Ambient Light
ConnectivityUSB-C (Data & Power)

What's in the box

  • Micro Bot Unit
  • USB-C Braided Cable (1.5m)
  • User Manual & Sticker Pack
  • Warranty Card
